slice: Froze the WEP to one workflow: Builder Project -> Build Theme -> Publish to Personal Repository -> Author/Test/Iterate -> Promote to Official Repository -> Studio Consumption. Added ThemeRepositoryClient.promote(themeId) -- copies an already-Personal-published Theme (row + Storage assets, via Storage copy(), no rebuild) into Official; requires Personal already published, fails clearly if not. World Builder's Publish screen reordered into Publish (Personal, primary) / Promote (Official, dependent) / Export (portability, non-primary) sections with new copy. Import deferred, not removed: js/creationFlow.js's IMPORT_ENABLED=false hides the Add New World button/card; index.html's old importThemeBtn hidden via display:none. All underlying Import code (importThemeFile, importPackage, _wireImportButton) untouched and fully functional. goldenBuild.js 30/30 and the Happy Flow suite both pass unchanged; new WEP scope Playwright suite passes
